script: |
  Write-Host "Build.SourcesDirectory:"
  Write-Host "$(Build.SourcesDirectory)"

  $intServicesPath = Join-Path "$(Build.SourcesDirectory)" "src\WNZL.ICOW.DeceasedEstates.IntServices"
  $functionsDir = Join-Path $intServicesPath "WNZL.ICOW.DeceasedEstates.AzureFunctions"
  $functionsProj = Join-Path $functionsDir "WNZL.ICOW.DeceasedEstates.AzureFunctions.csproj"

  Write-Host ""
  Write-Host "IntServices path:"
  Write-Host $intServicesPath
  Write-Host (Test-Path $intServicesPath)

  Write-Host ""
  Write-Host "AzureFunctions dir:"
  Write-Host $functionsDir
  Write-Host (Test-Path $functionsDir)

  Write-Host ""
  Write-Host "AzureFunctions csproj:"
  Write-Host $functionsProj
  Write-Host (Test-Path $functionsProj)
